title: The Almighty Mob Chicken Pie
summary: The king of the pies. The tarragon makes it. Mandatory dollop of mustard. You have to give this one a go. Follow this simple recipe and you’ll learn how to make Mob's comforting and delicious chicken pie, filled with tender chunks of chicken and veggies in a creamy sauce, topped with a flaky crust. Cook Mob's chicken and leek pie recipe today you’ll have a new family favourite which literally everyone will want a slice of. It’s a homemade pie recipe that’s impossible to mess up. All you need is a few simple ingredients to make it as well – using shop-bought puff pastry won’t just save you time faffing about in the kitchen but it’ll ensure you get the perfect golden casing for your puffed up pie. Cook smarter, not harder.

method.description: Dice up your chicken thighs into chunks. Add some olive oil to a large pan and brown the chicken. Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
Finely slice your leeks, bacon and onions.
Add bacon to the chicken pan and fry until crispy. Deglaze the pan with a splash of water. Add the leeks and onion.
Fry until soft, adding a splash of water if the vegetables start catching on the pan.
Once soft, add the chicken. Stir it in and add a large handful of chopped tarragon. Stir again and flour.
Mix it in, making sure the flour is all absorbed. Pour in milk, splash by splash. Keep stirring until you have a thick pie filling. Season generously with pepper. Remove the pan from the heat.

Fill a pie dish with the filling. Lay your puff pastry on top. Trim the sides and brush the pastry with egg yolk wash. Add a sprinkle of salt and place in the oven for 30 minutes, or until the pastry is puffed up and golden.
Slice your pie up and serve with a big dollop of Dijon mustard. Enjoy!

chefs.name: Ben Lebus
chefs.summary: Ben Lebus is the CEO and founder of Mob. Ben has always been passionate about food and learnt to cook from his father, who ran an Italian restaurant for a number of years. You can regularly find him cooking (and eating) some sort of puttanesca.
